name: orchestrator-workflow
description: Enforce proper Orchestrator workflow for ProTraderSim multi-agent development

steps.message: Complex task detected. Orchestrator coordination required.
Ensure task is properly decomposed into subtasks
Verify appropriate specialist agents are assigned

fallback.message:
For complex ProTraderSim tasks, please use the Orchestrator agent:

1. Start with: '@orchestrator [describe your task]'
2. Orchestrator will decompose and coordinate with specialist agents
3. Specialist agents: @coding, @frontend, @schema, @security, @test, @documentation

Example: '@orchestrator Build a trailing stop loss feature for the trading platform'
